latHint: Think triggering a strong reaction - not a literal spark.
pivHint: Fireworks begin with a single SPARK - but an idea that causes a SPARK of debate does what to it?
winText: Setting it off. SPARK was the pivot - firework SPARK to evoking a reaction.
lossText: EVOKE - to trigger or bring forth. SPARK was the pivot: firework SPARK to SPARK and EVOKE a response.
